member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.ConfigServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for configuring API client options in an .
member.remarks: This class contains methods to simplify the configuration of API client options, including binding configuration sections or using custom configuration actions.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.ConfigServiceCollectionExtensions.<G>$7B30185E57B8298C6754F16C0BCF4773.<M>$6BEA73177691D2862842D66CC9F1DED9
member.param: The to which the configuration will be added.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.ConfigServiceCollectionExtensions.<G>$7B30185E57B8298C6754F16C0BCF4773.ConfigureApiClient(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Configures the API client options for the application using the specified configuration section.
member.param: The instance containing the configuration data.
The name of the configuration section to bind to the . Defaults to if not specified.
member.returns: The updated instance.
member.exception: Thrown when or is null.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.ConfigServiceCollectionExtensions.<G>$7B30185E57B8298C6754F16C0BCF4773.ConfigureApiClient(System.Action{MyLab.ApiClient.Options.ApiClientOptions})
member.summary: Configures API client options for the application.
member.param: An to configure the .
member.returns: The updated instance.
member.exception: Thrown when is null.

member.summary: Provides an implementation of that uses an to create and configure instances of based on a specified service name.

member.summary: Provides an instance of for making HTTP requests.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.DI.SingleHttpClientProvider
member.summary: Provides a single instance of for making HTTP requests.
member.remarks: This class implements the interface and ensures that the same instance is reused for all requests.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of

member.param: The used to create the instance.
The name of the service for which the is created.
member.returns: A new instance of configured with the specified .
member.exception: Thrown if or is null.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.JsonSerialization.IJsonSerializer
member.summary: Provides methods for serializing objects to JSON and deserializing JSON strings to objects.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.JsonSerialization.IJsonSerializer.Deserialize``1(System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes the specified JSON string into an object of the specified type.
member.typeparam: The type of the object to deserialize to.
member.param: The JSON string to deserialize.
member.returns: An object of type deserialized from the JSON string.
member.exception: Thrown when the string is null, empty, or consists only of white-space characters.
Thrown when the JSON string is invalid or cannot be deserialized into the specified type.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.JsonSerialization.IJsonSerializer.Deserialize(System.String,System.Type)
member.summary: Deserializes the specified JSON string into an object of the specified type.
member.param: The JSON string to deserialize.
The target type of the object to deserialize to.
member.returns: An object of the specified deserialized from the JSON string.
member.exception: Thrown when the string is null, empty, or consists only of white-space characters.
Thrown when the JSON string is invalid or cannot be deserialized into the specified type.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.JsonSerialization.IJsonSerializer.Serialize``1(``0)
member.summary: Serializes the specified object into a JSON string.
member.typeparam: The type of the object to serialize.
member.param: The object to serialize.
member.returns: A JSON string representation of the specified object.
member.exception: Thrown when the is null.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.JsonSerialization.MicrosoftJsonSerializer
member.summary: A JSON serializer implementation using the Microsoft JSON library.
member.remarks: This class provides methods for serializing objects to JSON strings and deserializing JSON strings to objects. It is configured using the class to customize serialization behavior.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.JsonSerialization.NewtonJsonSerializer
member.summary: A JSON serializer implementation using Newtonsoft.Json.
member.remarks: This class provides methods for serializing objects to JSON strings and deserializing JSON strings to objects. It utilizes for configuring serialization behavior.

member.summary: Provides a default instance of configured with default JSON serialization settings.

member.summary: Default configuration section name

member.summary: Defines url-encoded-form serialization settings

member.summary: Extracts options from configuration section

member.summary: Contains api connection options

member.summary: API base url

member.summary: Do not verify the server SSL certificate

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Options.ApiJsonSettings
member.summary: Defines JSON serialization settings

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Options.ApiJsonSettings.IgnoreNullValues
member.summary: Ignores null fields. True by default.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Options.ApiUrlFormSettings
member.summary: Defines url-encoded-form serialization settings

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Options.ApiUrlFormSettings.EscapeSymbols
member.summary: Converts symbols to its escaped representation. True by default

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Options.ApiUrlFormSettings.IgnoreNullValues
member.summary: Ignores null fields. False by default.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Problems.ProblemDetails
member.summary: A machine-readable format for specifying errors in HTTP API responses based on .

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Problems.ProblemDetails.Type
member.summary: A URI reference [RFC3986] that identifies the problem type. This specification encourages that, when dereferenced, it provide human-readable documentation for the problem type (e.g., using HTML [W3C.REC-html5-20141028]). When this member is not present, its value is assumed to be "about:blank".

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Problems.ProblemDetails.Title
P:MyLab.ApiClient.Problems.ProblemDetails.Status
member.summary: The HTTP status code([RFC7231], Section 6) generated by the origin server for this occurrence of the problem.

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Problems.ProblemDetails.Detail
member.summary: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Problems.ProblemDetails.Instance
member.summary: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem. It may or may not yield further information if dereferenced.

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Problems.ProblemDetails.Extensions
member.summary:
Gets the for extension members.
Problem type definitions MAY extend the problem details object with additional members. Extension members appear in the same namespace as other members of a problem type.
member.remarks: The round-tripping behavior for is determined by the implementation of the Input \ Output formatters. In particular, complex types or collection types may not round-trip to the original type when using the built-in JSON or XML formatters.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Problems.ValidationProblemDetails
member.summary: A for validation errors.

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Problems.ValidationProblemDetails.Errors
member.summary: Gets the validation errors associated with this instance of .

member.summary: Reads and deserializes the content of the HTTP response message into an object of the specified type.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.ContentDeserializing.IContentDeserializer
member.summary: Defines a contract for deserializing HTTP content into objects of a specified type.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.ContentDeserializing.IContentDeserializer.Predicate(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the deserializer can process content for the specified return type.
member.param: The type of the object to be deserialized.
member.returns: if the deserializer supports the specified return type; otherwise, .
member.exception: Thrown if is .

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.ContentDeserializing.IContentDeserializer.DeserializeAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpContent,System.Type)
member.summary: Asynchronously deserializes the provided HTTP content into an object of the specified type.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.ContentDeserializing.IContentDeserializerProvider
member.summary: Provides a mechanism to retrieve a content deserializer capable of processing a specific target type.
member.remarks: This interface is designed to support the selection of an appropriate implementation of based on the target type for deserialization.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.ContentDeserializing.IContentDeserializerProvider.GetRequiredDeserializer(System.Type)
member.summary: Retrieves a content deserializer that is capable of processing the specified target type.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.ContentDeserializing.UnexpectedResponseContentTypeException
member.summary: Throws when response content has unexpected media type

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.ContentDeserializing.UnexpectedResponseContentTypeException.ActualMediaType
member.summary: Gets the actual media type of the response content that caused the exception.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.ContentDeserializing.UnexpectedResponseContentTypeException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.ResponseCodeException
member.summary: Throws when got an unexpected response HTTP code

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.ResponseCodeException.StatusCode
member.summary: Response status code

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.ResponseCodeException.ServerMessage
member.summary: Server message

member.summary: Format serverMessage

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Tools.HttpMessageDumper
member.summary: Contains tools to create dump from http request and response

member.summary: Default max body size for dumping

member.name: F:MyLab.ApiClient.Tools.HttpMessageDumper.ContentIsTooLargeText
member.summary: DumpAsync text when body is too large

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Tools.HttpMessageDumper.MaxRequestBodySize
member.summary: Set to customize request body size which is maximum dor dumping

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Tools.HttpMessageDumper.MaxResponseBodySize
member.summary: Set to customize response body size which is maximum dor dumping

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Tools.HttpMessageDumper.DumpAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpRequestMessage)
member.summary: Dumps a request

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Tools.HttpMessageDumper.DumpAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpResponseMessage)
member.summary: Dumps a response

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Tools.RequestParameterModelExtractor.FromMethod(System.Reflection.MethodInfo,MyLab.ApiClient.RequestFactoring.ContentFactoring.RequestFactoringSettings)
member.summary: Extract from reflection method

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.ApiClientProxy
member.summary: Represents a dynamic proxy for API client contracts, enabling the interception and processing of API requests based on the specified contract and configuration.
member.remarks: This class is designed to dynamically create and manage API client proxies for specified contracts. It utilizes reflection and request processing logic to handle API calls, ensuring proper serialization, deserialization, and request execution.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.ApiClientProxy.CreateForContract``1(MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.IRequestProcessor,MyLab.ApiClient.Options.ApiClientOptions)
member.summary: Creates a proxy instance for the specified API contract type.
member.typeparam: The type of the API contract for which the proxy is being created. This type must be an interface that defines the API contract.
member.param: The request processor responsible for handling HTTP requests and responses.
The options used to configure the API client, including serialization settings and optional HTTP message dumper.
member.returns: A proxy instance that implements the specified API contract type.
member.exception: Thrown if the proxy instance cannot be created.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.HttpClientRequestProcessor
member.summary: Processes HTTP requests using an to obtain an .
member.remarks: This class implements the interface and is responsible for sending HTTP requests using the provided instance.

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.HttpClientRequestProcessor.HttpClientProvider
member.summary: Gets the instance used to supply objects for processing HTTP requests.
member.value: An implementation of that provides instances.
member.remarks: This property is initialized through the constructor and is used internally to obtain instances for sending HTTP requests.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.HttpClientRequestProcessor.#ctor(MyLab.ApiClient.DI.IHttpClientProvider)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.ApiClientInvoker`1
member.summary: Provides functionality to invoke API client methods defined in a contract interface.
member.typeparam: The type of the contract interface that defines the API client methods.
member.remarks: This class is responsible for processing API requests and responses, creating invocation expressions, and managing the configuration and logic required to interact with the API.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.ApiClientInvoker`1.FromContract(MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.IRequestProcessor,MyLab.ApiClient.Options.ApiClientOptions)
member.summary: Creates an instance of from the specified contract type.
member.typeparam: The type of the contract interface that defines the API client methods.
member.param: An implementation of used to process HTTP requests.
The containing configuration settings for the API client.
member.returns: A new instance of configured for the specified contract type.
member.remarks: This method initializes the API client invoker by creating the necessary request processing logic, including request factoring settings, service model, and response deserialization tools.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.ApiClientInvoker`1.ForExpression(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task}})
member.summary: Creates an API invocation expression based on the provided contract method expression.
member.param: An expression representing a method of the contract interface that defines the API call to be invoked.
member.returns: An object implementing that allows further configuration and execution of the API invocation.
member.typeparam: The type of the contract interface that defines the API methods.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IApiInvocationExpression`1
member.summary: Represents an API invocation expression that allows configuration and execution of API calls based on a contract interface.
member.typeparam: The type of the contract interface that defines the API methods to be invoked.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IApiInvocationExpression`1.When(System.Net.HttpStatusCode,System.Net.HttpStatusCode[])
member.summary: Configures processing logic for specific HTTP status codes.
member.param: The primary HTTP status code to handle.
Additional HTTP status codes to handle.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IApiInvocationExpression`1.When1xx
member.summary: Configures processing logic specifically for HTTP 1xx (Informational) status codes.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IApiInvocationExpression`1.When2xx
member.summary: Configures processing logic specifically for HTTP 2xx (Successful) status codes.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IApiInvocationExpression`1.When3xx
member.summary: Configures processing logic specifically for HTTP 3xx (Redirection) status codes.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IApiInvocationExpression`1.When4xx
member.summary: Configures processing logic specifically for HTTP 4xx (Client Error) status codes.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IApiInvocationExpression`1.When5xx
member.summary: Configures processing logic specifically for HTTP 5xx (Server Error) status codes.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IApiInvocationExpression`1.ThrowIfAnotherStatusCode
member.summary: Ensures that an exception is thrown if the HTTP response status code does not match any of the configured status codes.
member.returns: The current API invocation expression, allowing for further configuration or execution of the API call.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IApiInvocationExpression`1.InvokeAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the API call asynchronously based on the configured invocation expression.
member.param: A token to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains detailed information about the service call, including the HTTP request and response details.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IApiExpressionConditionalStarter`1
member.summary: Represents a conditional starter interface for configuring API invocation expressions based on specific HTTP status codes or conditions.
member.typeparam: The type of the API client contract associated with the invocation.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IApiExpressionConditionalStarter`1.ProcessResult``1(System.Action{``0,System.Net.HttpStatusCode})
member.summary: Configures the processing of the result for the current API client invocation.
member.typeparam: The type of the result to be processed.
member.param: The action to be executed for processing the result. It receives the result of type (which can be null) and the HTTP status code of the response.
member.exception: Thrown if the parameter is null.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IApiExpressionConditionalStarter`1.ProcessStatusCode(System.Action{System.Net.HttpStatusCode})
member.summary: Configures the API invocation expression to process the HTTP status code of the response using the specified action.
member.param: An action to be executed with the HTTP status code of the response.
member.returns: The API invocation expression for further configuration or execution.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IApiExpressionConditionalStarter`1.ProcessProblem(System.Action{MyLab.ApiClient.Problems.ProblemDetails,System.Net.HttpStatusCode})
member.summary: Configures a processing action to handle API invocation results as problems.
member.param: A delegate that processes the object and the associated HTTP status code.
member.remarks: This method is used to define custom logic for handling API invocation results that are represented as problems, typically conforming to the Problem Details standard (RFC 7807).

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IApiExpressionConditionalStarter`1.ProcessValidationProblem(System.Action{MyLab.ApiClient.Problems.ValidationProblemDetails,System.Net.HttpStatusCode})
member.summary: Configures a processing action to handle validation problems encountered during an API client invocation.
member.param: The action to execute when a validation problem occurs. The action receives the instance and the associated HTTP status code as parameters.
member.remarks: Use this method to define custom logic for handling validation problems, such as logging errors or transforming validation details into a specific format.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IApiExpressionConditionalStarter`1.ProcessResultAsync``1(System.Func{``0,System.Net.HttpStatusCode,System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Configures the asynchronous processing of the result for the current API client invocation.
member.typeparam: The type of the result to be processed.
member.param: The asynchronous function to be executed for processing the result. It receives the result of type (which can be null) and the HTTP status code of the response.
member.returns: The current API invocation expression, allowing further configuration or execution.
member.exception: Thrown if the parameter is null.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IApiExpressionConditionalStarter`1.ProcessStatusCodeAsync(System.Func{System.Net.HttpStatusCode,System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Configures the API invocation expression to process the HTTP status code of the response asynchronously using the specified function.
member.param: A function to be executed asynchronously with the HTTP status code of the response.
member.returns: The API invocation expression for further configuration or execution.
member.exception: Thrown if the parameter is null.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IApiExpressionConditionalStarter`1.ProcessProblemAsync(System.Func{MyLab.ApiClient.Problems.ProblemDetails,System.Net.HttpStatusCode,System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Configures an asynchronous processing action to handle API invocation results as problems.
member.param: A delegate that processes the object and the associated HTTP status code asynchronously.
member.returns: An instance of to allow further configuration or execution of the API invocation.
member.remarks: This method is used to define custom asynchronous logic for handling API invocation results that are represented as problems, typically conforming to the Problem Details standard (RFC 7807).

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IApiExpressionConditionalStarter`1.ProcessValidationProblemAsync(System.Func{MyLab.ApiClient.Problems.ValidationProblemDetails,System.Net.HttpStatusCode,System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Configures an asynchronous processing action to handle validation problems encountered during an API client invocation.
member.param: The asynchronous function to execute when a validation problem occurs. The function receives the instance and the associated HTTP status code as parameters.
member.returns: An updated API invocation expression that allows further configuration or execution of the API call.
member.remarks: Use this method to define custom asynchronous logic for handling validation problems, such as logging errors, transforming validation details into a specific format, or triggering additional asynchronous operations.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.UnexpectedResponseStatusCodeException
member.summary: Represents an exception that is thrown when an API response status code does not match the expected or handled status codes.
member.remarks: This exception is typically used in scenarios where API response validation fails, and the status code is not among the predefined or handled status codes.

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.UnexpectedResponseStatusCodeException.StatusCode
member.summary: Gets the HTTP status code that caused the exception.
member.value: The unexpected HTTP status code returned by the API response.
member.remarks: This property provides the status code that was not expected or handled, leading to the exception being thrown. It can be used for debugging or logging purposes to identify the issue with the API response.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.UnexpectedResponseStatusCodeException.#ctor(System.Net.HttpStatusCode)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.StatusCodePredicate
member.summary: Represents a predicate that evaluates a condition on an HTTP status code.
member.param: The HTTP status code to evaluate.
member.returns: true if the condition is met for the specified ; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IProcessingAction
member.summary: Defines an action to be performed during the processing of an API call result.

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IProcessingAction.Predicate
member.summary: Gets the predicate that determines whether the processing action should be executed based on the provided .

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.IProcessingAction.PerformAsync(MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.CallDetails,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the processing action asynchronously using the provided call details and cancellation token.
member.param: The details of the API call to be processed. Must not be null.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.
member.exception: Thrown when is null.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation2.CallDetailsPredicate
member.summary: Represents a predicate that evaluates a instance.
member.param: The details of the service call to evaluate.
member.returns: true if the predicate condition is satisfied for the provided ; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.ApiClientInvocationResult
member.summary: Represents the result of an API client invocation, including details about the API call and the context for processing the call result.
member.remarks: This record encapsulates the details of an API call, such as the call's metadata and the processing context, which defines how the result of the call should be handled.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.ApiClientInvocationResult.#ctor(MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.CallDetails,MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.CallResultProcessingContext)
member.summary: Represents the result of an API client invocation, including details about the API call and the context for processing the call result.
member.remarks: This record encapsulates the details of an API call, such as the call's metadata and the processing context, which defines how the result of the call should be handled.

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.ApiClientInvocationResult.ProcessingStrategy
member.summary: Gets or sets the strategy used for processing the result of an API client invocation.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.ApiClientInvocationResult.When(System.Net.HttpStatusCode,System.Net.HttpStatusCode[])
member.summary: Configures processing logic for specific HTTP status codes.
member.param: The primary HTTP status code to handle.
Additional HTTP status codes to handle.
member.returns: A instance to define further processing actions.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.ApiClientInvocationResult.When1xx
member.summary: Configures processing logic specifically for HTTP 1xx (Informational) status codes.
member.returns: A instance to define further processing actions for HTTP 1xx status codes.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.ApiClientInvocationResult.When2xx
member.summary: Configures processing logic specifically for HTTP 2xx (Successful) status codes.
member.returns: A instance to define further processing actions for HTTP 2xx status codes.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.ApiClientInvocationResult.When3xx
member.summary: Configures processing logic specifically for HTTP 3xx (Redirection) status codes.
member.returns: A instance to define further processing actions for HTTP 3xx status codes.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.ApiClientInvocationResult.When4xx
member.summary: Configures processing logic specifically for HTTP 4xx (Client Error) status codes.
member.returns: A instance to define further processing actions for HTTP 4xx status codes.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.ApiClientInvocationResult.When5xx
member.summary: Configures processing logic specifically for HTTP 5xx (Server Error) status codes.
member.returns: A instance to define further processing actions for HTTP 5xx status codes.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.ApiClientInvocationResult.ThrowIfAnotherStatusCode
member.summary: Throws an exception if the HTTP response status code does not match any of the configured status codes.
member.returns: A new instance with the updated processing context that enforces throwing an exception for unhandled status codes.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.ApiClientInvocationResult.ProcessAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the processing logic defined in the for the current API call details.
member.param: A that can be used to cancel the processing operation.
member.returns: A representing the asynchronous operation.
member.exception: Thrown if the is null.
Thrown if the operation is canceled via the provided .

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.ApiClientInvoker`1
member.summary: Provides functionality to invoke methods on an API client contract.
member.typeparam: The type of the API client contract that defines the interface for interacting with the API.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.ApiClientInvoker`1.FromContract(MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.IRequestProcessor,MyLab.ApiClient.Options.ApiClientOptions)
member.summary: Creates an instance of for the specified contract type.
member.typeparam: The contract type that defines the API client interface.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.ApiClientInvoker`1.InvokeAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task}})
member.summary: Invokes a method on the API client contract asynchronously.
member.param: An expression representing the method invocation on the API client contract. The expression must be a lambda expression that specifies the method to call and its arguments.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an object, which provides details about the API call and its processing context.
member.exception: Thrown when the parameter is null.
Thrown when the parameter is not a valid lambda expression representing a method call.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.CallDetailsPredicate
member.summary: Represents a predicate that evaluates a instance.
member.param: The details of the service call to evaluate.
member.returns: true if the predicate condition is satisfied for the provided ; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.CallResultProcessingContext
member.summary: Represents the context for processing the result of an API call.
member.param: A collection of predicates that define the status codes handled by the processing logic.
A collection of actions to be executed during the processing of the API call result.
Indicates whether an exception should be thrown if the status code of the API response does not match any of the handled status predicates.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.CallResultProcessingContext.#ctor(System.Collections.ObjectModel.ReadOnlyCollection{MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.StatusCodePredicate},System.Collections.ObjectModel.ReadOnlyCollection{MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.IProcessingAction},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Represents the context for processing the result of an API call.
member.param: A collection of predicates that define the status codes handled by the processing logic.
A collection of actions to be executed during the processing of the API call result.
Indicates whether an exception should be thrown if the status code of the API response does not match any of the handled status predicates.

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.CallResultProcessingContext.HandledStatusPredicates
member.summary: A collection of predicates that define the status codes handled by the processing logic.

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.CallResultProcessingContext.ProcessingActions
member.summary: A collection of actions to be executed during the processing of the API call result.

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.CallResultProcessingContext.ThrowIfAnotherStatusCode
member.summary: Indicates whether an exception should be thrown if the status code of the API response does not match any of the handled status predicates.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.IFluentProcessingStrategy
member.summary: Defines a strategy for fluent processing of API client invocation results.

member.summary: Processes the result of an API client invocation asynchronously.
member.param: Contains detailed information about the API call, including request and response data.
The context for processing the API call result, which includes status predicates and processing actions.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.IProcessingAction
member.summary: Defines an action to be performed during the processing of an API call result.

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.IProcessingAction.Predicate
member.summary: Gets the predicate that determines whether the processing action should be executed based on the provided .

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.IProcessingAction.PerformAsync(MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.CallDetails,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the processing action asynchronously using the provided call details and cancellation token.
member.param: The details of the API call to be processed. Must not be null.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.
member.exception: Thrown when is null.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.ProcessingActionBuilder
member.summary: Provides a builder for configuring processing actions for API client invocation results.
member.remarks: This class is used to define custom processing logic for API client invocation results, such as handling specific HTTP status codes or processing errors.

member.summary: Configures the processing of the result for the current API client invocation.
member.typeparam: The type of the result to be processed.
member.param: The action to be executed for processing the result. It receives the result of type (which can be null) and the HTTP status code of the response.
member.returns: An updated instance with the configured processing action.
member.exception: Thrown if the parameter is null.

member.param: A delegate that processes the object and the associated HTTP status code.
member.returns: The instance to allow further configuration or processing.
member.remarks: This method is used to define custom logic for handling API invocation results that are represented as problems, typically conforming to the Problem Details standard (RFC 7807).

member.param: The action to execute when a validation problem occurs. The action receives the instance and the associated HTTP status code as parameters.
member.returns: The instance, allowing further configuration or processing.
member.remarks: Use this method to define custom logic for handling validation problems, such as logging errors or transforming validation details into a specific format.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.StatusCodePredicate
member.summary: Represents a predicate that evaluates a condition on an HTTP status code.
member.param: The HTTP status code to evaluate.
member.returns: true if the condition is met for the specified ; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.UnexpectedResponseStatusCodeException
member.summary: Represents an exception that is thrown when an API response status code does not match the expected or handled status codes.
member.remarks: This exception is typically used in scenarios where API response validation fails, and the status code is not among the predefined or handled status codes.

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.UnexpectedResponseStatusCodeException.StatusCode
member.summary: Gets the HTTP status code that caused the exception.
member.value: The unexpected HTTP status code returned by the API response.
member.remarks: This property provides the status code that was not expected or handled, leading to the exception being thrown. It can be used for debugging or logging purposes to identify the issue with the API response.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.Invocation.UnexpectedResponseStatusCodeException.#ctor(System.Net.HttpStatusCode)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.IRequestProcessor
member.summary: Defines a mechanism for processing HTTP requests in an API client.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.IRequestProcessor.ProcessRequestAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpRequestMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Processes an HTTP request asynchronously and returns the corresponding HTTP response.
